documents.title: onlava Documentation Index
documents.summary: Human entry point for the repo knowledge base, with explicit agent entry points and current-contract guidance.

documents.title: onlava Docs Knowledge Index
documents.summary: Machine-readable docs metadata for agents and harness validation, including active ExecPlan entries until deterministic plan indexing exists.

documents.title: onlava Repo Agent Instructions
documents.summary: Repo-local operating manual for agents changing onlava itself, including the session/capability model, validation, docs review-due signals, drift handling, and client-app instruction rules.

documents.title: onlava Installable Agent Skill
documents.summary: Concise installed-skill entrypoint for using current onlava apps through app sessions and capabilities, including CLI JSON, scoped observability queries, managed toolchain diagnostics, browser UI harness validation, app validation profiles, docs review-due signals, debugging, databases, generated clients, and validation loops.

documents.title: onlava Agent Guide
documents.summary: Agent workflow guide for using CLI JSON, app-session capabilities, scoped observability queries, managed toolchain commands, app validation profiles, cache artifacts, TypeScript clients, and app-local instruction layering.

documents.title: onlava Agent-First Harness Plan
documents.summary: Root plan translating OpenAI harness engineering ideas into onlava implementation priorities, with the browser UI harness marked as implemented baseline and route-depth work tracked separately.

documents.title: onlava Execution Plans Standard
documents.summary: Required structure for long-running agent-executable implementation plans; reviewed against current self-harness ExecPlan section enforcement.

documents.title: onlava Architecture
documents.summary: High-level repo map, architectural boundaries, invariants, and cross-cutting concerns, updated for current onlava up/serve command naming.

documents.title: onlava Local Contract
documents.summary: Frozen local developer and agent-facing contract for onlava CLI, JSON schemas, app-session capabilities, scoped observability queries, harness evidence artifacts, validation profile artifacts, UI harness journey artifacts, cache artifacts, toolchain store, generators, configured tasks, code tasks, and local runtime surfaces.

documents.title: onlava Environment Reference
documents.summary: Human reference for onlava-owned environment variables, app-injected process identity, managed toolchain controls, local dev overrides, and tooling escape hatches.

documents.title: onlava Environment Registry
documents.summary: Machine-readable registry of approved environment variables, families, metadata, documentation links, and secret flags enforced by self-harness.

documents.title: Grafana Dev Integration
documents.summary: Dev-only Grafana supervision, managed toolchain binary resolution, provisioning paths, stable datasource/dashboard UIDs, and environment controls.

documents.title: onlava Harness Engineering
documents.summary: Agent validation loop, shared harness evidence model, agent-context handoff file, browser UI harness route journeys and DOM artifacts, self-harness contract, and doc-gardening rules for review-due and drift handling.

documents.title: onlava App Development Cookbook
documents.summary: Practical recipes for building onlava apps, endpoints, auth, middleware, Temporal workers, cron, configured generators, code tasks, generated clients, proxy config, scoped observability debugging, and validation workflows.

documents.title: onlava UI Agent Contract
documents.summary: Rules for composing dashboard and app UI from onlava-owned primitives, layouts, and the @onlava registry instead of direct shadcn usage.

documents.title: Bind-Mounted Neon Storage
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for moving self-hosted Neon durable storage from Docker anonymous volumes into Onlava-owned bind-mounted directories under the shared Neon substrate root, while preserving worktree isolation through branch pins, leases, timelines, and compute endpoints.

documents.title: Built-In Neon Selfhost Driver
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for making the real neon-selfhost branch driver a built-in Onlava CLI capability that auto-records, auto-resolves, owns tenant/timeline/compute lifecycle, implements branch mutations and schema diff, and proves branch/Electric isolation.

documents.title: CLI Help and Human Session Status
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made root help orienting, moved full grammar into command-specific help and help all, added a machine-readable help manifest, and made bare onlava ps human-readable while preserving ps --json.

documents.title: App Validation Profiles
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that added app-owned validation profiles under `.onlava.json`, `onlava validate`, `inspect validation`, harness-style evidence artifacts, changed-file selection, and an optional harness bridge.

documents.title: CLI Observability Query Surface
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan for scoped CLI-only LogsQL and PromQL/MetricsQL query commands under existing observability nouns, with discovery, JSON contracts, and session-isolation validation.

documents.title: Harness Self Summary Output
documents.summary: Completed ExecPlan that made onlava harness self stdout summary-first, preserved explicit full archive mode, added focused harness drill-downs, and switched binary freshness to a worktree-local build.

documents.title: Agent-First Development Control Plane
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for aligning repo knowledge, active plan indexing, review-due signals, tech debt, and docs/behavior drift handling before implementation work.

documents.title: Onlava-Managed Neon Dev Cell and Branch Isolation
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for an Onlava-owned local Neon dev cell, branch-isolated managed Postgres provider, worktree/session branch pins, and agent-safe branch/worktree workflows.

documents.title: Temporal Worker Production Hardening
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for task-queue scoping, deterministic workflow starts, durable ONLV async flows, worker deployment promotion, cron policy, and manifest/connection hardening.

documents.title: ONLV Agent Native Dev Migration
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for making ONLV consume the agent-native local development model by default through onlava-owned dev sessions, routes, Postgres, Electric, and docs.

documents.title: Agent Dev Safety Hardening
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for agent-dev hardening around ownership fingerprints, cleanup, explicit sessions, legacy escape hatches, and parallel validation.

documents.title: Agent Runtime Operational Hardening
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for source-review gap closure around devdash storage, DB-aware prune, non-destructive restart, legacy proxy removal, setup policy, and the two-worktree ONLV gate.

documents.title: Browser Direct API Routing
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for replacing Pulse's same-origin Vite API proxy with direct browser calls to the agent-routed API origin, with explicit auth, CORS, and sync validation.

documents.title: Test Suite Speed and Stability
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for fixing flaky Grafana version probing, expected CLI warnings, timing reports, and warm-cache Go test runtime.

documents.title: Harness Self Agent Oracle
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for making self-harness a machine-readable development oracle with full tests, recommendations, timing budgets, schema validation, context pack, and drift checks.

documents.title: Remove Objectstore Functionality
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for removing the beta data/objectstore feature surface without compatibility aliases or dormant code paths.

documents.title: Structured Dev Events and Console
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for a structured source-aware dev event spine, log filters, observing-only terminal console, and error summaries over the same stream.

documents.title: Dev Event Backend Cutover and Parity
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for VictoriaLogs dev-event cutover and JSON-backed dashboard/session metadata parity.

documents.title: Frozen Toolchain Manifest and Managed Tool Store
documents.owner: onlava runtime / release tooling / agent DX
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for a frozen toolchain manifest, managed local tool store, toolchain CLI, and removal of implicit system PATH resolution for Onlava-managed tools.

documents.title: onlava Doctor Command
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for a fast, read-only doctor command that reports host readiness, resources, version metadata, dependency checks, and app-sensitive diagnostics.

documents.title: TypeScript Temporal Workers
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for domain-local TypeScript Temporal activities, generated worker runtime files, external Go activity declarations, and validation.

documents.title: Remove Legacy Agent Transport
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for removing obsolete agent transport from config, routing, dashboard, tests, docs, and self-harness checks.

documents.title: Database Lifecycle Split
documents.summary: Active ExecPlan for splitting DB apply, seed, and setup from generated SQLC artifacts and migrating ONLV to the new lifecycle.

documents.title: Split Local Development From Headless Runtime
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for splitting development supervisor behavior from headless runtime execution; current local startup is onlava up and headless runtime execution is onlava serve.

documents.title: onlava v0 Release Readiness
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for hardening a narrow production-ready v0 contract; current command contract lives in docs/local-contract.md.

documents.title: Victoria Observability Sidecars
documents.summary: Completed historical ExecPlan for supervising local VictoriaMetrics, VictoriaLogs, and VictoriaTraces sidecars as the local observability substrate.

documents.title: Active Plans
documents.summary: Current plans that should inform agent decisions, using permanent historical IDs and linking active ExecPlans also indexed in docs/knowledge.json; 0067 moved to completed history.

documents.title: Completed Plans
documents.summary: Completed milestones and shipped behavior, including the CLI observability query surface and implemented browser UI harness baseline.

documents.title: Standard Auth Production Migration Runbook
documents.summary: Operator checklist and SQL template for preserving existing app-owned auth data when moving to onlava standard auth; reviewed against current standard auth schema fields.

documents.title: Tech Debt
